name: Double Cashew Crackers
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350°F.
In a food processor or large bowl, combine zest, flour, salt, pepper, and sugar. Cut in the butter until you have a mixture resembling coarse breadcrumbs. Mix in cashew butter, chopped cashews, and water. Stir until a smooth dough forms. Wrap in waxed paper and chill for 1 hour. Once chilled, divide dough into 2 equal portions. Roll out to approximately 1/4 inch thickness. With a sharp knife, cut into 2-inch squares and transfer to an ungreased cookie sheet. Bake for 20 to 25 minutes or until golden brown. Cool on a wire rack.
